languages.text: Засверкали разряды, с шипением испаряя кровь и металл. Призмы, созданные извращенным гением чужаков, рушились одна за другой, оседая лужицами расплавленного металла.

traits.locale_text: Плазменные ружья засверкали, с шипением испаряя металл и превращая сияющие глифы в безобразные обгорелые шрамы; там же, где требовалась меньшая мощь, стрелки методично выбивали ключевые узлы, нарушая идеальную геометрию рунных цепей и разрывая смертоносный контур, пока путь вперед не стал безопасным.

languages.text: Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.
languages.original_text: Засверкали разряды, с шипением испаряя кровь и металл. Призмы, созданные извращенным гением чужаков, рушились одна за другой, оседая лужицами расплавленного металла.

traits.locale_text: Discharges sparked, vaporising blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.
Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.

Plasma sparked, vaporising metal with a hiss and turning the glowing glyphs into unsightly burned scars. Where greater precision was called for, shots knocked out key nodes, breaking the perfect geometry of the rune chains and severing the deadly circuit to make the onward path safe.
Discharges sparked, vaporising blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.
Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.

languages.text: 等离子放射嘶鸣，将血液与金属一同蒸发。棱镜接连崩塌，最终只剩下一滩滩熔化的金属，证明那些异形扭曲的天才造物曾经存在过。
languages.original_text: Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.

traits.locale_text: 等离子放射嘶鸣，将血液与金属一同蒸发。棱镜接连崩塌，最终只剩下一滩滩熔化的金属，证明那些异形扭曲的天才造物曾经存在过。

languages.text: Las descargas de plasma vaporizaron sangre y metal con un siseo. Uno tras otro, los prismas se colapsaron. De las perversas creaciones de los xenos solo quedaron charcos de metal fundido.
languages.original_text: Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.

traits.locale_text: Las descargas de plasma vaporizaron sangre y metal con un siseo. Uno tras otro, los prismas se colapsaron. De las perversas creaciones de los xenos solo quedaron charcos de metal fundido.

languages.text: Des décharges de plasma désintégrèrent le sang et le métal dans un sifflement. Les prismes s'effondrèrent les uns après les autres, jusqu'à ce qu'il ne reste plus de ces créations issues du génie pervers des xénos que des flaques de métal en fusion.
languages.original_text: Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.

traits.locale_text: Des décharges de plasma désintégrèrent le sang et le métal dans un sifflement. Les prismes s'effondrèrent les uns après les autres, jusqu'à ce qu'il ne reste plus de ces créations issues du génie pervers des xénos que des flaques de métal en fusion.

languages.text: Plazma salınımları, kanı ve metali tıslayarak buharlaştırdı. Prizmalar, kâfir zeno dehasının o yarattıklarından geriye erimiş metal birikintilerinden başka bir şey kalmayana kadar birbiri ardına çöktü.
languages.original_text: Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.

traits.locale_text: Plazma salınımları, kanı ve metali tıslayarak buharlaştırdı. Prizmalar, kâfir zeno dehasının o yarattıklarından geriye erimiş metal birikintilerinden başka bir şey kalmayana kadar birbiri ardına çöktü.

languages.text: Mit einem Zischen vaporisierten Plasmaentladungen Blut und Metall. Ein Prisma nach dem anderen explodierte, bis von den Werken eines perversen Xenosgenies noch nur geschmolzenes Metall übrig war.
languages.original_text: Plasma discharges vaporised blood and metal with a hiss. Prism after prism collapsed, until puddles of molten metal were all that was left of those creations of perverse xenos genius.

traits.locale_text: Mit einem Zischen vaporisierten Plasmaentladungen Blut und Metall. Ein Prisma nach dem anderen explodierte, bis von den Werken eines perversen Xenosgenies noch nur geschmolzenes Metall übrig war.

languages.text: プラズマがスパークし、金属を蒸発させ、金属を蒸発させ、光る文字を不快な焼け跡に変えた。より正確な操作が必要な場合は、ショットが重要なノードを破壊し、ルーンチェーンの完璧な幾何学を崩し、死の回路を断ち、道を安全なものにした。
languages.original_text: Plasma sparked, vaporising metal with a hiss and turning the glowing glyphs into unsightly burned scars. Where greater precision was called for, shots knocked out key nodes, breaking the perfect geometry of the rune chains and severing the deadly circuit to make the onward path safe.

traits.locale_text: プラズマがスパークし、金属を蒸発させ、金属を蒸発させ、光る文字を不快な焼け跡に変えた。より正確な操作が必要な場合は、ショットが重要なノードを破壊し、ルーンチェーンの完璧な幾何学を崩し、死の回路を断ち、道を安全なものにした。
